name: Chaitanya Malani
headline: Automation Engineer @ SCOR | AWS Certified Developer Associate | Software Engineer | FullStack Developer
about:
I am a Software Engineer with a strong focus on Cloud Computing, AI/ML, and Automation Engineering. I am currently completing my Master’s in Computer Science at EPITA, Paris, alongside my end-of-studies internship at SCOR Paris as an Automation Engineer. My work spans data pipeline automation, backend reliability, and end-to-end testing frameworks across large-scale environments.

I bring experience in building automation frameworks on Databricks (PySpark, SQL), designing backend and frontend validation solutions with Node.js and Playwright, and deploying them using Docker and Jenkins CI/CD. Alongside this, I have over 14 months of prior full stack development experience with React and Java Spring Boot, creating scalable applications and APIs.

My passion lies at the intersection of AI/ML and Cloud:
	• Certified in AWS Developer Associate, Cloud Practitioner, and Generative AI (AWS Bedrock)
	• Currently pursuing IBM AI-Enabled certifications to deepen expertise in machine learning workflows, generative AI, and model deployment
	• Hands-on with Python ML libraries (scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch basics), data preprocessing, and feature engineering

I am particularly motivated by opportunities where I can apply my engineering expertise to build scalable, cloud-native solutions and integrate AI/ML capabilities that deliver real business value.

Open to full-time opportunities in Software Engineering, Cloud, or AI/ML, based in France or across Europe.
topSkills: Amazon Web Services (AWS) • React.js • Node.js • Python • JavaScript

experience.description:
- Implemented containerization of the application using Docker
- Built Jenkins pipelines for CI/CD across multiple environments
- Designed & deployed an automated non-regression pipeline on Databricks, reducing execution time by nearly 90%
- Developed an automation framework using Playwright for frontend & backend testing with CI integration and reporting

- Collaborated with cross functional teams to design and develop reusable UI components using React.js and Angular.js, reducing front-end development time by 20%
- Developed and optimised RESTful APIs using Node.js and Django, improving system performance by 30% through efficient data flow design
- Deployed server less cloud solutions with AWS Lambda and DynamoDB, cutting costs by 20%
- Automated CI/CD pipelines via GitLab, reducing deployment errors by 40%

- Trained a batch of 100 students, covering foundational cloud concepts and deployment strategies
- Conducted comprehensive hands-on lab sessions on core AWS services such as IAM, EC2, S3, Lambda and Amplify

projects.title: Neural Style Transfer
projects.description: This project is a complete implementation of Neural Style Transfer (NST) using a pretrained transformer network, enabling both image and video stylization using a fast, real-time feedforward model.

projects.title: Face Recognition Attendance System
projects.description: A real-time face recognition-based attendance system using Python, Streamlit, Redis, and InsightFace. This system detects faces, matches them with stored embeddings, and logs attendance in Redis.

projects.title: Twitter Clone
projects.description: This project is a full-stack Twitter clone application with a React frontend and Node.js backend.

projects.title: Chatting Web Application
projects.description: This is a chatting web application which is based on Django Channels and Web Sockets.

projects.title: Mailing System
projects.description:
This is a web-based mailing application that sends and receives emails using API requests. 
It has been developed using Python, Django, HTML, CSS and JavaScript.

projects.title: E-Commerce Auction Management
projects.description:
This is a web application that allows users to post auction listings and bid on them. 
It has been developed using Python, Django, HTML, CSS and JavaScript.

projects.title: Face Mask Detection
projects.description: This is a python application that uses machine learning models for detecting if a person is wearing a mask or not.

projects.title: Book Review System
projects.description:
This web application allows users to search books based on a book name or author. It displays book details such as cover page, ratings and reviews. 
It has been developed using Flask. It fetches the book details from Goodreads portal using API's.

receivedRecommendations.description:
I highly recommend Chaitanya Malani for roles related to software engineering.

During his assignment, Chaitanya made a strong contribution to the APEX Calculation Engine by developing robust automated tests using PySpark on Databricks, significantly improving the reliability and stability of critical calculations. He also designed and implemented backend API tests in Java, enhancing overall test coverage and helping detect regressions early.
Chaitanya additionally worked on enhancing a Jenkins pipeline to enable the automatic triggering of tests and explored Docker integration to improve portability and execution consistency of test environments, demonstrating a strong DevOps-oriented mindset.
Beyond his solid technical skills, Chaitanya stood out for his autonomy, proactivity, and positive attitude. He was very pleasant to work with and consistently showed initiative, often exceeding expectations in both execution and collaboration.
Chaitanya proved to be a reliable, motivated, and quality-driven professional. I am confident he would be a strong asset to any technical team.
